resources.name: identification_and_certification_01_1_duration
resources.title: 01.1 - Schedule - Identification and Certification - duration

fields.name: publication_time
fields.title: Publication Time
fields.description: Time the filing was made available on the FERC RSS feed.

fields.name: form_type
fields.title: Form Type
fields.description: Enter proper form type from the provided values in the taxonomy.

fields.name: submission_type
fields.title: Original Submission or Resubmission
fields.description: Enter a value of "O" for an original submission.  Enter a value of "R" for a resubmission.

fields.name: title_of_contact_person
fields.title: Title of Contact Person
fields.description: Title of contact person for the respondent.

fields.name: legal_entity_identifier
fields.title: Legal Entity Identifier
fields.description: Legal Entity Identification Number issued by Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF.org). The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is a 20-character, alpha-numeric code based on the ISO 17442 standard developed by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO).

fields.name: unit_dispatch_not_based_on_economic_dispatch_of_thermal_units
fields.title: Unit Dispatch Not Based on Economic Dispatch of Thermal Units
fields.description: Enter a value of "True" if unit dispatch is not based on the economic dispatch of thermal units (i.e., a system lambda is not calculated).  Enter a value of "False" if unit dispatch is based on the economic dispatch of thermal units.

fields.name: report_year_period
fields.title: Report Year Period
fields.description: Year and period of the report in the following format 2019/1Q.

fields.name: report_period
fields.title: Report Period
fields.description: Period of the report in the following format Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4.

fields.name: phone_extension_of_contact_person
fields.title: Phone Extension of Contact Person
fields.description: Phone extension of contact person for the respondent.

fields.name: telephone_of_contact_person
fields.title: Telephone of Contact Person, Including Area Code
fields.description: Telephone of contact person, including area code.

fields.name: name_of_contact_person
fields.title: Name of Contact Person
fields.description: Name of contact person for the respondent.

fields.name: migrated_data
fields.title: Migrated Data
fields.description: This indicates the values shown in the rendering is historical data migrated from the database. If the value is true, it means that the values are migrated.

fields.name: respondent_legal_name
fields.title: Respondent Identification, Name
fields.description: Exact legal name of the respondent.

fields.name: email_of_contact_person
fields.title: Email of Contact Person
fields.description: Email of contact person for the respondent.

fields.name: company_identifier
fields.title: Company Identifier
fields.description: Unique entity Identification Number used by FERC.

fields.name: vendor_name
fields.title: Vendor Name
fields.description: Name of software company used for creating the instance file submitted. If the filer created the submission, enter "none" or "NA".

fields.title: Order Number
fields.description: This is used to order a sequenced table.  This field is added to a table to control ordering of the items on the table.  The value must always be an integer. If this is not used, instance fact values in a sequenced table are shown in a random order in rendering.

fields.name: disclosure_of_how_respondent_calculates_system_lambda_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of How Respondent Calculates System Lambda [Text Block]
fields.description:
Provide in writing a detailed description of how Respondent calculates system lambda. For those systems that do not use an economic dispatch algorithm and do not have a system lambda, provide in writing a detailed description of how Balancing Authority Area resources are efficiently
dispatched.

fields.title: Time Zone
